source.name: GitHub Primer
source.license_notes: Use source links and summarized guidance only; do not copy full documentation verbatim.

layout_rules: Use vertical nav for the current context and mark the active view clearly.
Group long lists into named sections or use dividers for visual grouping.
Limit nested navigation depth; reconsider IA if more than a few levels are needed.
accessibility_notes: Use aria-current for the active item.
Do not replace navigation with a tree view when semantic navigation is needed.
implementation_hints: Use for GitHub-like sidebars in developer tools and admin settings.
Icons should clarify destinations, not add noise.

retrieval.ai_summary: Use Primer NavList for developer/admin sidebars: vertical contextual links, active state via aria-current, grouped sections, limited nesting, and optional leading icons.
